title: create_base
description: Input and output schemas for the create_base tool (BI-0083)

path.description: Vault-relative path to the .base file. Must end in .base (case-insensitive). Path-traversal sequences rejected.

name.description: Name for the new item (becomes the Markdown filename)

content.description: Optional body text for the new item. Subject to platform argv-size ceiling pre-check.

view.description: Optional view name within the base. Not validated by CLI (R-006).

vault.description: Vault display name for multi-vault routing. Note: silently ignored by current CLI (R-004).

path.description: Vault-relative path of the created item (wrapper-constructed from base directory + CLI-returned filename)

name.description: Actual filename of the created item (may differ from requested name due to auto-increment on collision)
